models.title: Phoenix Sand Matte Porcelain Tile
source_fields:
Phoenix Sand Matte Porcelain Tile is a versatile and stylish choice for your home or commercial space. This beautiful beige tile offers durability and elegance, making it suitable for various applications in both indoor and outdoor settings, including kitchens and bathrooms.

  • The straight or rectified edge ensures a seamless look, adding sophistication to any room.
  • The matte finish provides a modern, understated elegance while being easy to clean and maintain.
  • Ideal for installation on floors and walls, offering flexibility in design options.
  • Suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, enhancing any area with its timeless appeal.
  • Waterproof feature makes it perfect for wet areas like bathrooms and kitchens, ensuring longevity.
  • Safe for shower floors, providing a durable surface that withstands moisture.
  • Perfect for shower walls, creating a cohesive and stylish bathroom design.

With its beige color, rectangular shape, and matte finish, Phoenix Sand Matte Porcelain Tile offers a contemporary look that complements any decor. Measuring 12 x 24 inches with a thickness of 9MM, this tile is designed to last while providing an elegant touch to your space.

models.title: Urban Graphite Matte Porcelain Tile
source_fields:
Urban Graphite Matte Porcelain Tile is the perfect choice for any residential or light commercial space, offering a sleek and modern look with its black matte finish. This versatile tile can be used in both indoor and outdoor settings, making it an ideal option for various applications.

  • The rectified edge ensures a precise and seamless installation, providing a clean and sophisticated appearance.
  • The matte finish gives a contemporary feel while being easy to maintain, enhancing the overall aesthetic of your space.
  • Suitable for both floor and wall installations, allowing you to create a cohesive design throughout your home or business.
  • Waterproof feature makes it perfect for areas prone to moisture, such as bathrooms and kitchens, ensuring durability and longevity.
  • Safe for shower floors and walls, providing a stylish and functional solution for your bathroom renovation needs.

With its rectangular shape and nominal size of 12 x 24 inches, the Urban Graphite Matte Porcelain Tile from Adessi offers a modern look that complements any design style. Its black color adds a touch of elegance to any room.

models.title: Venato Matte Porcelain Tile
source_fields:
Venato Matte Porcelain Tile by San Giorgio is the perfect choice for enhancing the beauty of your bathroom or kitchen. With its elegant marble look, this tile offers both style and durability, making it ideal for any residential or commercial space.

  • The straight or rectified edge ensures a seamless installation, providing a sleek and modern appearance.
  • A matte finish adds a sophisticated touch while minimizing glare, perfect for creating a serene atmosphere.
  • Suitable for floor or wall installation, offering versatility in design options to suit your needs.
  • Designed for indoor and outdoor use, making it a versatile option for various spaces.
  • Waterproof feature ensures long-lasting performance in moisture-prone areas like bathrooms and kitchens.
  • Safe for shower floors, providing a durable and stylish solution that stands up to daily use.
  • Ideal for shower walls, offering a beautiful and practical choice that enhances your bathroom's aesthetic.

With its white color and rectangular shape, Venato Matte Porcelain Tile creates a timeless marble look. Measuring 12 x 24 inches with an approximate thickness of 9mm, this tile is perfect for any fireplace surround or other decorative applications.

models.title: Forum Ivory Matte Porcelain Tile
source_fields:
Forum Ivory Matte Porcelain Tile is the perfect choice for both residential and commercial spaces, offering a beautiful matte finish that complements any decor. With its versatile design, this tile can be installed on floors or walls, providing a seamless look throughout your home or business.

  • The pressed edges ensure a clean, uniform appearance, making installation easier and enhancing the overall aesthetic.
  • The matte finish offers a modern look while being easy to maintain and clean, ideal for busy households.
  • Suitable for installation on both floor and wall surfaces, providing flexibility in design and application.
  • Perfect for both indoor and outdoor use, allowing you to create cohesive designs from interiors to exteriors.
  • Completely waterproof, making it an excellent choice for kitchens and bathrooms where water exposure is frequent.
  • Safe for shower floors, ensuring durability and safety in wet environments.
  • Ideal for shower walls as well, providing a sleek and water-resistant surface thats easy to clean.

Available in a classic white color with a smooth surface texture, Forum Ivory Matte Porcelain Tile enhances any space with its rectangular shape and nominal size of 12 x 24. The tiles stain-resistant properties ensure long-lasting beauty while maintaining its pristine look.

models.title: Tauleto Bianco Matte Porcelain Tile
source_fields:
Tauleto Bianco Matte Porcelain Tile by Castille is a versatile and stylish choice for enhancing the aesthetics of any space. Ideal for both residential and commercial use, this tile offers a beautiful stone look with a matte finish that complements any decor.

  • The pressed edge ensures seamless installation and provides a clean, sophisticated appearance.
  • Its matte finish delivers an elegant touch while minimizing glare and enhancing the overall look.
  • Suitable for installation on both floors and walls, offering flexibility in design options.
  • Perfect for both indoor and outdoor applications, making it highly versatile for various spaces.
  • Waterproof feature ensures durability and longevity, ideal for bathrooms and kitchens.
  • Safe for shower floors, providing a reliable and attractive option for wet areas.
  • Approved for shower walls, ensuring a cohesive look throughout your bathroom.

With its white color, rectangular shape, and stone look style family, Tauleto Bianco Matte Porcelain Tile adds a touch of luxury to any room. Measuring 12 x 24 inches with an approximate thickness of 8mm, it is perfect for creating a modern yet timeless ambiance.

notes: Model intelligence is a compound workflow: category search, model extraction, spec-document capture, and model-page probing.
Blocked model pages are reported as evidence instead of silently dropping retailer coverage.
Category search-result model discovery used; search-derived prices are labeled as fallback evidence, not direct retailer API results.
